name: MARA Holdings, Inc.
sandbox_note: Discovery-first IR scraper walks ir.mara.com listing pagination to discover historical mining-related PR pages instead of relying on guessed monthly URLs. ir.mara.com must be added to settings.json networkAllowList.

name: Riot Platforms, Inc.
sandbox_note: Discovery-first IR scraper uses RIOT's historical WordPress archive pages rather than the shell IR landing page. Template URLs remain as fallback helpers for manual/archive workflows. BusinessWire RSS returns 0 results as of 2026-03. Final monthly production update was December 2025 (switched to quarterly reporting).

name: CleanSpark, Inc.
sandbox_note: CleanSpark IR is currently protected by a Cloudflare challenge, so discovery uses the PR Newswire organization page instead of the IR listing. Direct IR templates remain reference-only for known historical URLs. PRNewswire org page: https://www.prnewswire.com/news/cleanspark%2C%20inc./

name: Core Scientific, Inc.
sandbox_note: Discovery-first IR scraper now walks investors.corescientific.com press release pagination directly. Pre-bankruptcy coverage is irregular and should be boundary-checked from 2022 onward. CIK 0001839341 verified against EDGAR (Core Scientific, Inc./tx). Old CIK 0001836012 was WDC Fund 1 LLC (wrong).

name: Cipher Mining Inc.
skip_reason: EDGAR 8-K filings are primary source. Mining operations began mid-2021.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001819989 verified against EDGAR (Cipher Digital Inc., ticker CIFR). Old CIK 0001836028 was Florida Oil & Gas Alternative Fund LLC (wrong).

name: TeraWulf Inc.
sandbox_note: Discovery-first IR scraper walks investors.terawulf.com press release pagination directly; RSS remains secondary but is not treated as the full-history boundary. CIK 0001083301 verified against EDGAR (TERAWULF INC., ticker WULF). This is a legacy shell CIK (formerly IKONICS CORP / CHROMALINE CORP) reused via reverse merger Dec 2021. Old CIK 0001839175 was M3-Brigade Acquisition II Corp (wrong). TeraWulf began mining operations at Lake Mariner facility December 2021; first full-month production PRs begin early 2022.

name: Hut 8 Corp.
skip_reason: EDGAR 10-K/10-Q filings are primary source. Monthly production PRs available via PRNewswire (https://www.prnewswire.com/news/hut-8-corp./) but no RSS feed confirmed.
sandbox_note: Hut 8 Corp is the US-incorporated entity formed from the November 2023 merger of Hut 8 Mining Corp (Canada) and US Bitcoin Corp (USBTC). Ticker changed from HUT8 to HUT at that time. CIK 0001964789 verified against EDGAR (Hut 8 Corp., ticker HUT, DE incorporated). Old entity Hut 8 Mining Corp is CIK 0001731805 (Canadian, deregistered Dec 2023, no ticker). Old config CIK 0001900035 was First Person Ltd (wrong).

name: Stronghold Digital Mining, Inc.
skip_reason: Quarterly reporter; EDGAR 8-K filings are primary source. Reports mining metrics in quarterly earnings rather than monthly production updates.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001856028 verified against EDGAR (Stronghold Digital Mining, Inc.). Old CIK 0001845610 was Empire State Greenhouses LLC (wrong).

name: Applied Digital Corporation
skip_reason: Quarterly reporter; EDGAR 10-Q/10-K filings are primary source. HPC data center business alongside mining; fiscal year ends May 31.
sandbox_note: Formerly Catapult Solutions Group (APLD ticker adopted post-rebrand). Applied Digital entered BTC mining via hosting/HPC services; direct BTC mining metrics may be limited.

name: American Bitcoin Corp.
skip_reason: New company formed 2025; limited EDGAR filing history. CIK 0001755953 confirmed.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001755953 verified against EDGAR (American Bitcoin Corp., ticker ABTC, DE). SIC 6199. Formed early 2025 as partnership between Hut 8 Corp and Eric/Donald Trump Jr. Mining operations on Hut 8 US infrastructure.

name: IREN Limited
skip_reason: IR page returns 502 as of 2026-03; EDGAR 6-K/20-F filings are primary source.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001878848 verified against EDGAR (IREN Ltd, ticker IREN). Formerly Iris Energy Limited (rebranded to IREN in 2024). Australian company listed on Nasdaq as foreign private issuer. Fiscal year ends June 30. Files 20-F (annual) and 6-K (current reports) with SEC. Old CIK 0001871135 was MOBILE PORTFOLIO H LLC (wrong).

name: Bit Digital, Inc.
skip_reason: Foreign private issuer; EDGAR 6-K/20-F filings are primary source.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001710350 verified against EDGAR (Bit Digital, Inc, ticker BTBT). Cayman Islands holding company, operations primarily in North America and Iceland. Monthly BTC production updates filed as 6-K with SEC. Formerly ZW Data Action Technologies; pivoted to BTC mining 2020. Old CIK 0001717307 was Industrial Logistics Properties Trust (wrong).

name: Bitdeer Technologies Group
sandbox_note: Drupal year-filter widget. Widget ID and form_build_id extracted dynamically from base page. GlobeNewswire org search: https://www.globenewswire.com/search/organization/Bitdeer%20Technologies%20Group

name: Argo Blockchain plc
skip_reason: IR page returns 502 as of 2026-03; EDGAR 6-K/20-F filings are primary source.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001841675 verified against EDGAR (Argo Blockchain Plc, tickers ARBK/ARBKF). UK-incorporated company listed on Nasdaq and London Stock Exchange. Files 20-F (annual) and 6-K (monthly production reports) with SEC. Sold Helios Texas facility to Galaxy Digital in 2023; now operates primarily in Quebec. Old CIK 0001779063 was Guggenheim Defined Portfolios Series 1944 (wrong).

name: BitFuFu Inc.
skip_reason: Foreign private issuer; EDGAR 6-K/20-F filings are primary source. GlobeNewswire search URL stored for reference.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001921158 verified against EDGAR (Bitfufu Inc., tickers FUFU/FUFUW). Cayman Islands holding company; Singapore-based BTC mining and cloud mining services company. Listed on Nasdaq via SPAC (Arisz Acquisition Corp) in 2024. Bitmain affiliate. rss_url is a GlobeNewswire keyword search URL (not a company RSS feed). Old CIK 0001850838 was Omega Therapeutics Inc (wrong).

name: Cango Inc.
skip_reason: Foreign private issuer; EDGAR 6-K/20-F filings are primary source. Pivoted to BTC mining in late 2024.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001725123 verified against EDGAR (Cango Inc., ticker CANG). Cayman Islands holding company; formerly a Chinese auto financing platform. Sold auto financing business and pivoted to BTC self-mining in late 2024. Limited mining history; BTC production data begins approximately Q4 2024. Old CIK 0001726445 was Seer Inc (wrong).

name: Bitfarms Ltd.
sandbox_note: IR site migrated from bitfarms.com/investors/ to investor.bitfarms.com. Drupal year-filter widget; years 2018-2026 available. Company announced US redomiciliation and rebranding to 'Keel Infrastructure' (Feb 2026) — IR domain may change again. Old URL (https://bitfarms.com/investors/press-releases/) returns 404. GlobeNewswire org search: https://www.globenewswire.com/search/organization/Bitfarms%20Ltd§

name: HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd.
skip_reason: Canadian company filing 40-F/6-K via EDGAR; monthly GPU and BTC production updates in 6-K filings.
sandbox_note: CIK 0001720424 verified against EDGAR (HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd., ticker HIVE). Incorporated in British Columbia, Canada; dual-listed on Nasdaq and TSX. Fiscal year ends March 31. Files 40-F (annual) and 6-K (current reports) with SEC. Mines both BTC and ETH (GPU farms in Iceland, Sweden, Canada). Formerly HIVE Blockchain Technologies; rebranded to HIVE Digital in 2023. Old CIK 0001558730 was Destrier Capital Partners Ltd (wrong).
